title: MCP servers configuration
description: Standard mcpServers config consumed by the MCP admin console (Add server → Paste JSON). Mirrors src/features/servers/mcpConfig.ts.

mcpServers.description: Map of server name → server definition.

command.description: Executable for a stdio (sandboxed) server, e.g. "uvx" or "npx".

env.description: Environment variables. Stored as server config (visible to admins) — use the Credentials tab for secrets.

url.description: Endpoint URL for a remote (HTTP/SSE) server.

type.description: Optional explicit transport. Inferred from command/url when omitted.

headers.description: Headers for a remote server (not yet applied by the console).

disabled.description: When true the server is created disabled.

autoApprove.description: Ignored — the gateway has no per-tool auto-approve.
